messages.content:
Goals:
  1) Execute benchmark suite:
     pnpm bench:agent -- --api http://localhost:4200/api --model g
  pt-5-mini
  2) Run regression check:
     pnpm bench:regression
  3) Analyze latest suite JSON and identify:
     - top 3 slowest prompts by duration
     - highest tool-call prompts
     - highest retry prompts
     - PR success rate and edit success rate
  4) Propose and implement exactly ONE small, safe optimization
  with highest expected p95 impact.
  5) Re-run the same suite subset (top 5 slowest prompts) to
  validate impact.
  6) Report before/after deltas:
     - median duration
     - p95 duration
     - avg tool calls
     - retries/run
     - success rates

  Constraints:
  - Keep changes surgical.
  - Ask before touching more than 3 files.
  - Do not modify unrelated code.
  - No refactors/format-only churn.
  - Include exact commands and outputs in final summary.
